popularStory.headline: Life Sketch of Thomas Fox  B. 1619
popularStory.description: Thomas Fox was born in September 1619, probably in England.  He was the son of Samuel Fox.  His Mothers name is unknown.  He appears to have been well schooled, as even in his last illness his writ …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Fox於1619年10月24日出生在英國藍卡爾恩費爾德時，他的父親Samuel Fox36歲，母親Margaret Askew33歲。他於1640年與Rebecca Wheate在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼康可德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1658年4月14日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可康可德享年38歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可康可德笛卡爾 希爾 波英 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Fox于1619年10月24日出生在英国藍卡爾恩費爾德时，他的父亲Samuel Fox36岁，母亲Margaret Askew33岁。他于1640年与Rebecca Wheate在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼康可德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1658年4月14日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可康可德享年38岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可康可德笛卡爾 希爾 波英 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Fox
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from a word denoting the animal (Middle English, Old English fox), widely used to denote a sly or cunning individual. It was also used for someone with red hair. In England this surname absorbed some early examples of surnames derived from the ancient Germanic personal names mentioned at Faulks and Foulks .
Irish: part translation of Gaelic Mac an tSionnaigh ‘son of the fox’ (see Tinney ).
Irish: also adopted for Ó Catharnaigh, see Kearney .

variants.name: Faulks
meanings: English: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Fauque, Fauques, Fau(l)ques (oblique case Fau(l)que), originally an ancient Germanic byname Falco, meaning ‘falcon’.

variants.name: Foxman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Charna, Isadore, Shmuel.

variants.name: Fuchs
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Hans, Kurt, Gerhard, Fritz, Mathias, Matthias, Armin, Ulrich, Erwin, Helmut.

German and Jewish: from Middle High German vuhs, German Fuchs ‘fox’, a nickname for a sly or cunning person, or for someone with red hair. This surname is also found in France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine), Poland, Czechia, and Slovenia, often as a translation into German of corresponding Slavic nicknames or surnames. Compare Fox 4, Fuks , and Futch .

variants.name: Kearney
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Seamus, Caitlin, Declan, Dermot, Donovan, Eamonn, Liam.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Catharnaigh ‘descendant of Catharnach’, a personal name meaning ‘warlike’. Alternatively, it may be from Ó Cearnaigh or Mac Cearnaigh (from cearnach ‘victorious’) or from Ó Ceithearnaigh ‘descendant of Ceithearnach’, a personal name meaning ‘foot soldier’.

History: Most present-day bearers of this name are descended from Tadhg Ó Catharnaigh, killed in battle in 1084. He was nicknamed An Sionnach ‘the Fox’, and for this reason the Irish surname was sometimes Anglicized as Fox . Denis Kearney, born in Oakmont, Ireland, in 1847, was a US labor movement leader.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
Oldest grave seen in memorial list.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Fox was born on 24 October 1619, in Enfield, Lancashire, England, his father, Samuel Fox, was 36 and his mother, Margaret Askew, was 33. He married Rebecca Wheate in 1640, in Concord, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 14 April 1658, in Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 38, and was buried in Old Hill Burying Ground, Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Fox est né le 24 octobre 1619, à Enfield, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Samuel Fox, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margaret Askew, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Rebecca Wheate en 1640, à Concord, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 14 avril 1658, à Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Old Hill Burying Ground, Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Fox am 24. Oktober 1619 in Enfield, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Samuel Fox 36 und seine Mutter Margaret Askew 33. Er hat 1640 in Concord, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Rebecca Wheate geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 14. April 1658 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Old Hill Burying Ground, Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Fox è nato il il 24 ottobre 1619 nel Enfield, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Samuel Fox, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Askew, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Rebecca Wheate nel 1640, nel Concord, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 14 aprile 1658, nel Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Old Hill Burying Ground, Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Foxが1619年10月24日にイギリスランカシュアイアエンフィールドで生まれた時，父Samuel Foxは36歳，母Margaret Askewは33歳であった。1640年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーコンコルドでRebecca Wheateと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1658年4月14日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスコンコルドで38歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスコンコルドオルド ヒル ブリイング グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Fox(이)가 1619년 10월 24일 영국 랭카실르 필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Samuel Fox(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Askew(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1640년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 콘코르드에서 Rebecca Wheate(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1658년 4월 14일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 콘코르드에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 콘코르드 드 힐 버이잉 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Fox nasceu em 24 de outubro de 1619, em Enfield, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Samuel Fox, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Askew, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Rebecca Wheate em 1640, em Concord, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de abril de 1658, em Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Old Hill Burying Ground, Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Fox родился 24 октября 1619 г. в местности энфиелд, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Samuel Fox было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Askew, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Rebecca Wheate в 1640 г. в местности конкорд, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 14 апреля 1658 г. в местности конкорд, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности олд хилл буринг гроунд, конкорд, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Fox nació el 24 de octubre de 1619, en Enfield, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Samuel Fox, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Margaret Askew, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Rebecca Wheate en 1640, en Concord, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 14 de abril de 1658, en Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Old Hill Burying Ground, Concord, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
